Uses of Class
org.docgene.model.XMLArticle

  • Packages that use XMLArticle 
    Package Description
    org.docgene.model
    Contains the documentation model.
    org.docgene.plugins
    Contains the classes which manage the Plugins.
    org.docgene.scripts
    Contains the classes which manage the Scripting Plugin.
